tagline: NZ's leading waterproofing specialists — flat roofs, decks, basements and wet areas nationwide
description: H2OFF is a leading NZ waterproofing company operating across Auckland, Whangarei, Tauranga, Hamilton, Nelson, Christchurch, Dunedin, Queenstown, Wanaka, and Invercargill. Founded in 2013, H2OFF specialises in membrane waterproofing and flat roofing for residential, commercial, and industrial properties — covering new construction and waterproofing replacements. Their complete service includes carpentry work and full project management, with a reputation for good communication, punctuality, and clean worksites. Products include Nuralite Nuraply 3PM torch-on, Enviroclad TPO, Butynol, Volclay Swelltite, and Ecotuff TPO. All work complies with NZ Building Code Clause B2 Durability (15-year minimum system life).
known_for: Full-service waterproofing and flat roofing across NZ — torch-on, TPO, Butynol, deck and basement waterproofing, leak repairs.
